[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000100 2
1 11000011 4
2 10001100 3
3 00000100 1
4 00001011 3
5 00101100 3
6 01100001 3
7 01111011 6

01 10 11101111 7
12 21 11111110 7
23 32 11111111 a
34 43 10111111 7
45 54 01101101 5
56 65 01111011 6 match 7
67 76 11111111 a
70 07 11111111 a

02 20 11111111 a
13 31 10111111 7
24 42 01111110 6
35 53 11111011 7
46 64 01111111 7

71 17 11111100 6

47 74 11111100 6
50 05 11101011 6
61 16 11111111 a
72 27 11111110 7
